name: bryant24hao--oc-doctor
description: Runs a comprehensive 11-section health check on local OpenClaw installations. Diagnoses configuration errors, session bloat, model drift, cron issues, security misconfigurations, gateway problems, and system instruction token budget. Generates a structured report with CRITICAL/WARNING/INFO findings and offers interactive one-click fixes. Use when: "openclaw doctor", "claw doctor", "claw health check", "openclaw diagnose", or troubleshooting OpenClaw.
